conditions: New or updated Playwright tests committed to src/__tests__/e2e/.
Isolated mock data/seeding logic implemented and verified.
Zero Network (4xx/5xx) or Hydration errors observed.
Adherence to docs/ and API contracts.
No security vulnerabilities found in diff.

fixes_applied: Created UploadHUD component for centralized UI feedback.
Implemented useUploadStatus hook for safe localStorage polling.
Refactored Dashboard and History pages to use UploadHUD.
Updated upload utils to broadcast status to localStorage.
Added Zod validation for upload status data.
